title: Top Counterterrorism Official Resigns, Citing Iran War

title: US Seeks NATO Help with Strait of Hormuz; Vaccine Changes Blocked
summary: The U.S. requests NATO assistance in the Strait of Hormuz amid rising tensions. Federal judge blocks vaccine changes.

title: Iran's Supreme Leader Rejects De-escalation Proposals

title: Trump Claims He Can 'Take' Cuba
